title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.14.0 to 1.15.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.14.0 to 1.15.0.
Release notes *Sourced from [github.com/containers/storage's releases](https://github.com/containers/storage/releases).* > ## v1.15.0 > Remove redundant if statements for nil slices > pkg/archive: strictly handle errors reading xattrs > Move runroot containers storage into containers directory > VFS support for user.* xattrs > Add names-history support
Commits - [`30dba0e`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/30dba0edf229a602d42cabf5d42ad14f50d48d32) Bump to v1.15.0 - [`02614b1`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/02614b1e90389fed133b9bda9e944d3d5310c878) Merge pull request [#466](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/466) from zmedico/vfs-user-xattrs - [`974b127`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/974b127af7ddac2d8e4fd5485c14addf36c6c3b9) Merge pull request [#467](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/467) from rhatdan/runroot - [`8aac4ac`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/8aac4ac83a2b336f486b17edc461632d14cc943a) Merge pull request [#422](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/422) from saschagrunert/history-names - [`f39fb83`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/f39fb8370d82c1cfd3a7b3ce9e332a3c4b65a244) Remove redundant if statements for nil slices - [`0da4bc6`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/0da4bc60b3babedb098dd7a75ae4ec0b75031eab) pkg/archive: strictly handle errors reading xattrs - [`b6f5c76`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/b6f5c760ad761df8abd827663b5d0ae8ac9d7123) Move runroot containers storage into containers directory - [`5fc095c`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/5fc095c06d5576ceb0425eb67dd7a013b9f4b79b) VFS support for user.* xattrs - [`63a0f4e`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/63a0f4e50c12e3f1161f08295c414ac27ab9aa99) Merge pull request [#465](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/containers/storage/issues/465) from rhatdan/master - [`bba7f91`](https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/bba7f910dba64c89c0f3e20424e1952b31eeaf5b) Move to v1.14.1-dev - Additional commits viewable in [compare view](https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.14.0...v1.15.0)

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.14.0&new-version=1.15.0)](https://dependabot.com/compatibility-score.html?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.14.0&new-version=1.15.0) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot use these labels` will set the current labels as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these reviewers` will set the current reviewers as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these assignees` will set the current assignees as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use this milestone` will set the current milestone as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot badge me` will comment on this PR with code to add a "Dependabot enabled" badge to your readme Additionally, you can set the following in your Dependabot [dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com): - Update frequency (including time of day and day of week) - Pull request limits (per update run and/or open at any time) - Out-of-range updates (receive only lockfile updates, if desired) - Security updates (receive only security updates, if desired)
